CodeBlockMethod.Name: OnSyncProperty
CodeBlockMethod.Code:
log(name) log(value) if name ~= "TriggerVersion" then return end if self.Target == nil then return end if self.TriggeredBy == nil then return end
if self.TriggeredBy == _UserService.LocalPlayer then self.Target.Enable = true log("[CLIENT] 나만 보이는 사다리!") else log("[CLIENT] 다른 사람이 밟음, 나는 안 보임") end

CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandleTriggerEnterEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code: local triggerBodyEntity = event.TriggerBodyEntity if triggerBodyEntity == nil then return end self.TriggeredBy = triggerBodyEntity self.TriggerVersion = self.TriggerVersion + 1
